title: woodsia oblonga
intro: Woodsia oblonga is a species of fern, specifically a type of cliff fern, native to the mountainous regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Woodsia oblonga include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and help in treating digestive problems. Woodsia oblonga can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
